lean_stdlib_notes.list_mem: List.mem_cons_self has NO extra args. List.Mem.tail v hw for cons membership.
lean_stdlib_notes.import_placement: imports MUST be at the very top of the file, before any doc comments or code
lean_stdlib_notes.theorem_ordering: Define theorems BEFORE use - cannot forward-reference.
lean_stdlib_notes.barrel_file: formal-verification/lean/FVSquad.lean must import ALL module files for lake build to compile them
lean_stdlib_notes.doc_comments_before_eval: Use regular -- comments before #eval. Doc comments /-- -/ before #eval cause parse errors.
lean_stdlib_notes.open_namespace: MajorityVote.lean has no namespace - use majority etc. directly after import, no open needed.
lean_stdlib_notes.mergeSort_perm: List.mergeSort_perm l (fun a b => decide (a >= b)) (must be explicit)
lean_stdlib_notes.filter_sublist: Use by_cases + List.Sublist.cons₂/cons for filter monotone proofs
